channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 7 common transformation mistakes and how to avoid them
item.description: In Italy alone, over 60% of large companies hinge their strategies for success on digitalization, indicating a lack of awareness and perspective of what digital transformation actually means.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: CIO legend Andi Karaboutis on what every IT leader should master
item.description: The career journey of CIO Hall of Fame legend Adriana (Andi) Karaboutis spans multiple industries, geographies, and transformational moments.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: La restauración del patrimonio cultural se rinde a la innovación tecnológica
item.description: La compañía gallega Sixtema lleva a término el proyecto RESTAUR.AR, una iniciativa de I+D orientada a desarrollar nuevas herramientas digitales para la conservación, restauración y divulgación del patrimonio cultural.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google confirms Gemini Live's next big AI upgrade will be widely available on Android – with one catch
item.description: Real-time camera and screenshot analysis is heading to Gemini Live now, though you currently need to pay for it.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: CERN scientists release blueprint for the Future Circular Collider
item.description: Top minds at the world’s largest atom smasher have released a blueprint for a much bigger successor that could vastly improve research into the remaining enigmas of physics.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: 438 crypto masterminds are responsible for the majority of pump-and-dump crypto coin schemes globally, researchers find
item.description: Cryptocurrency pump-and-dump schemes rake in billions, but regulators struggle to keep up with manipulative masterminds hiding behind Telegram chats.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: IBM Cloud speeds AI workloads with Intel Gaudi 3 accelerators
item.description: IBM Cloud is broadening its AI technology services with Intel Gaudi 3 AI accelerators now available to enterprise customers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Stop the presses, the best Pokémon games ever are getting Nintendo Switch 2 releases – alongside several other GameCube titles
item.description: Pokémon Colosseum and other fantastic GameCube rereleases might convince me to pre-order a Nintendo Switch 2.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Underground trading of malicious LLMs is fueling cybercrime
item.description: The web is being swamped by AI slop—but the swamp is creeping closer to home. Your email inboxes, phone SMS apps, instant messaging, and social media services are all being overtaken by inauthentic content.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Say goodbye to disruptive OLED Care prompts on monitors - MSI will extend OLED Care 2.0 function to 24 hours
item.description: OLED monitors are gradually becoming more accessible for budget PC users, and MSI's efforts on its OLED Care 2.0 technology is great to see.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: FBI warns about new extortion scam targeting sensitive data
item.description: According to the FBI, cybercriminals are sending extortion letters, threatening to release victims' sensitive information unless a ransom is paid.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google’s new AI tech may know when your house will burn down
item.description: FireSat is a satellite project designed to detect and track wildfires early, aiming to detect a fire that's the size of a classroom within 20 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boebert to introduce resolution condemning Tesla vehicle attacks
item.description: Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-Colo.) introduced a Tuesday resolution condemning violent attacks on Tesla vehicles. “The definition of terrorism is the unlawful use of violence and intimidation in the pursuit of political aims.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Understand Python’s new lock file format
item.description: Python Enhancement Proposal (PEP) 751 gives Python a new file format for specifying dependencies. This file, called a lock file, promises to allow developers to reproduce the installation of their Python projects, with the exact same sets of dependencies, from system to system.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nasdaq 100’s worst quarter in years sealed by AI bubble fears
item.description: In a quarter marred by tariff uncertainty, US government spending cuts and the threat of recession, it is fears about a bubble brewing in artificial intelligence that have dealt the latest blow to the Nasdaq 100.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: How to use Apple’s Mail categorization AI in macOS 15.4
item.description: If you are among the rapidly-growing number of Mac users in the enterprise, you should know that Apple’s newly-released macOS Sequoia 15.4 is festooned with security updates, brings support for Apple Intelligence across most major languages (including to Europe), and introduces new AI tools for the
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Emergency Chrome security update amid cyber espionage threats
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reports that researchers have uncovered a Chrome vulnerability used in a cyber espionage campaign.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iron Man inspires Cisco’s AI-driven platform engineer
item.description: When it comes to developing highly intelligent AI agents, one might not think of combining open systems technology and the theoretical super-logic behind a movie character, but Cisco’s Outshift development team is doing just that.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Agentic AI won’t make public cloud providers rich
item.description: While major cloud providers, such as AWS, Google, and Microsoft are rushing to position themselves as leaders in AI development and deployment, the reality of agentic AI’s impact on public cloud growth may not align with their ambitious projections—at least, in my opinion. I’ll tell you why.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New Python lock file format will specify dependencies
item.description: Python’s builders have accepted a proposal to create a universal lock file format for Python projects that would specify dependencies, enabling installation reproducibility in a Python environment.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Building a Resilient Cyber Culture in 2025
item.description: In 2025, cyber threats will accelerate in complexity. Building a resilient cyber culture requires leadership commitment, clear expectations, and continuous improvement.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: New phishing attack uses real-time interception to bypass 2FA
item.description: This phishing kit bypasses 2FA via session hijacking and real-time credential theft. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers four ways to stay safe from Astaroth phishing attacks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Savan Kong on building first Pentagon CX Office from the ground up
item.description: DoD’s former CXO shares details from the young office’s efforts to begin scaling customer experience across the department. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Savan Kong on building first Pentagon CX Office from the ground up first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity
item.description: By integrating zero trust into a less complex network infrastructure, the military can access data to speed decisions, Army G-6 deputy chief of staff says. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tech startup, major airline partner to launch electric air taxi service
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses Joby Aviation and Virgin Atlantic planning to launch 200-mph U.K. air taxis linking airports and cities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How AI is transforming IDEs into intelligent development assistants
item.description: Ever feel like you’re spending more time squashing bugs than actually building something? You’re not alone—developers spend a whopping 35% of their time debugging and reviewing code instead of writing it. That’s like ordering pizza and only eating the crust.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Worldwide spending on genAI to surge by hundreds of billions of dollars
item.description: CIOs should prepare for a 76.4% rise in global generative AI (genAI) spending this year, driven by improved foundational models and growing demand, according to a Gartner research report released today.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI enables paralyzed man to control robotic arm with brain signals
item.description: The combination of artificial intelligence and neuroscience allows a paralyzed man to manipulate a robotic arm by using his brain to imagine movements.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI News: Kim Oversees Drone Test, Amazon Introduces Shopping Too
item.description: North Korea's Kim oversees test of AI-powered suicide drones, while Amazon introduces beta AI shopping too 'Interests'.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How the Navy is removing barriers to IT modernization
item.description: Barry Tanner, the deputy CIO for the Department of the Navy, said the initiative to reduce and eliminate duplicative applications is targeting business systems. The post How the Navy is removing barriers to IT modernization first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
